torch_pattern: scores = torch.matmul(q, k.transpose(-2, -1)) * scale; scores = scores.masked_fill(causal_mask, float('-inf')); probs = torch.softmax(scores, dim=-1); out = torch.matmul(probs, k[..., :head_dim_v])
weight_transform: none (activation-only fused op; no weights consumed). If replacing the explicit-V variant, the upstream W_v linear weight stays a separate ttnn.linear and is not folded into this op.
applicability_notes: torch_pattern_notes: MLA prefill SDPA where V is shared with K in latent space: V = K[..., :head_dim_v] (kv_lora_rank). Optional 3-tensor variant (q, k, v_embedding) reduces to standard SDPA chain matmul->scale->mask->softmax->matmul when an explicit V is passed (see test 3, used as a workaround with pre-applied W_v: repeat + linear on v_latent before the call).

placement_observations.size_descriptor: prefill activation [1, num_heads_local, seq_len, kv_lora_rank], seq_len large (prefill regime)
placement_observations.source: test: tt_out = ttnn.transformer.flash_mla_prefill(..., memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG, attn_mask=None, is_causal=True)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: prefill activation, explicit-V variant [1, num_heads, seq_len, head_dim_v]
placement_observations.source: test: tt_new_sdpa_out = ttnn.transformer.flash_mla_prefill(tt_q, tt_k, tt_v_embedding, ..., memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: prefill query [1, num_heads_local, seq_len, kv_lora_rank + rope_dim], produced by ttnn.concat([q_nope, q_rope], dim=-1) and deallocated immediately after the call
placement_observations.source: call_site: tt_q = ttnn.concat([tt_q_nope, tt_q_rope], dim=-1); attn_out = ttnn.transformer.flash_mla_prefill(tt_q, tt_kvpe_fp16, **cfg['flash_mla']); ttnn.deallocate(tt_q)
